name: osdi-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for OSDI submissions: venue fit, HotCRP submission audits, the no-rebuttal review process, USENIX open-access camera-ready, sysartifacts artifact evaluation, systems reproducibility, page-budget planning, writing style, related work, evaluation design, and cycle management. Grounded in the official OSDI '26 CFP, Call for Artifacts, and USENIX policy pages checked on 2026-07-08.
